name: printcalc-3d-v2
description: PWA e app Android para calculo de custo de impressao 3D.

scripts.build:web: powershell -Command "New-Item -ItemType Directory -Force www | Out-Null; Copy-Item index.html,style.css,script.js,sw.js,manifest.webmanifest -Destination www -Force; New-Item -ItemType Directory -Force www\assets | Out-Null; Copy-Item assets\* www\assets -Force"
